_description: Pass-level exclusion / flagging config — manual ground-truth from IMU & trajectory plot review (2026-06-10). The clearance-based impact_detected heuristic is a rough proxy; this file records passes where manual inspection overrides the heuristic.

_clearance_rules_of_thumb.clearance_ge_0.0: definitely NOT impacted — cage did not penetrate column boundary

_reviewer: manual pass-by-pass IMU + trajectory plot inspection

excluded_passes._description: Passes excluded from the dataset — no real collision despite what clearance/DB says, or data corruption. These are skipped by the pipeline and excluded from analysis plots.

flight_20260525-1716_75°_column_collisio.notes: No impact visible in IMU data. Visual trajectory angle ~90° does not match nominal 75° — likely missed the column entirely. DB clearance +0.2 (impact_detected=0 — DB agrees, but angle is wrong).

flight_20260526-0922_75°_column_collisio.notes: Clearance -0.3 cm but IMU shows no impact whatsoever. Cage may have grazed the column without transferring measurable force. Pass 04 in same flight had -0.4 cm clearance and DID impact — shows how tight the margin is.

flight_20260526-0931_75°_column_collisio.notes: Pass 02: clearance -0.1, no impact visible. Pass 04: clearance 0.0, impact_detected=1 by heuristic but only slight contact. Both below the reliable-impact threshold.

flight_20260528-1230_75°_column_collisio.notes: Pass 01: clearance -0.4, very slight impact — borderline. Pass 04: clearance -0.3, almost no impact. Pass 06: clearance -0.3, no impact at all. This flight had inconsistent column contact — passes 02 & 05 are fine (clearance -0.7/-0.6).

flight_20260528-1239_75°_column_collisio.notes: Pass 02: clearance -0.3, slight impact. Pass 03: clearance -0.4, slight impact. Both are marginal — cage may have barely touched. Excluded for clean analysis.

flight_20260529-1419_45°_column_collisio.notes: Clearance -0.2, slight impact. Other passes in this flight have clearance -0.7 to -0.9 — this one is an outlier. Also, unsliced MCAP for this flight was corrupted (ULog fallback used for battery).

flight_20260531-1228_45°_column_collisio.notes: Path after impact is missing from trajectory plot — data corruption in the pass MCAP or plot generation. Plot is broken/unreadable. This pass should not be included in any analysis.

flagged_passes._description: Passes kept in the dataset but flagged for awareness — marginal clearance, slight impact, or unusual characteristics. These are NOT excluded from analysis but may warrant caution in interpretation.

flight_20260525-1716_75°_column_collisio.notes: Already excluded (see above). Also flagged because visual trajectory angle ~90° doesn't match nominal 75°.

flight_20260528-1655_45°_column_collisio.notes: Clearance -0.3 but VERY clear impact in IMU — demonstrates that clearance alone is not sufficient to determine impact quality. KEPT in dataset.

flight_20260529-1049_45°_column_collisio.notes: Clearance -0.1 but SUPER clear impact — further evidence that clearance heuristic fails at margins. KEPT in dataset.

flight_20260526-0922_75°_column_collisio.notes: Clearance -0.4 and definitely impacted — contrasts with Pass 01 in same flight (-0.3, no impact). Demonstrates the ~1mm difference between hit and miss. KEPT in dataset.
